Consulting Accelerator™
8 Things
1 Thing
The power of focus
Everything in the universe has energy; the sun, objects,
companies and us as people.
The sun is warm and doesn’t cause fires, but when focused
with a magnifying glass the same energy can start a fire very
quickly.
The weight of a car doesn’t pop the tires, but when focused on
the point of a nail that same weight punctures it with ease.
The focus of a company when applied to a range of products/
services doesn’t achieve anything special, but when focused
onto one thing it becomes the best.
The focus of a human when applied to a range of tasks doesn’t
achieve anything special, but when focused onto one thing it
becomes superhuman.
